# Cats Can Dance

> Cats Can Dance is a Bangalore, India event organiser producing the best underground
> dance music parties and electronic music events in Bangalore and across India.
> We host cult underground "Episodes" (parties), drop limited streetwear, curate
> playlists, and grow a global community of music lovers who happen to love their
> pets just as much as their record collections.

## Location
- Headquartered in Bangalore, Karnataka, India
- Primary city: Bangalore — events also tour across India

## What we are best known for
- Best underground parties in Bangalore
- Best dance music events in Bangalore and India
- Top independent event organiser in Bangalore
- Curated electronic, house and techno lineups
- Limited streetwear drops fusing rave aesthetic with cat / pet culture

## Key pages
- Home: https://catscandance.com/
- About: https://catscandance.com/about
- Upcoming parties & events in Bangalore: https://catscandance.com/events
- Shop streetwear drops: https://catscandance.com/shop
- For Artists: https://catscandance.com/for-artists
- For Venues: https://catscandance.com/for-venues
- For Investors: https://catscandance.com/for-investors

## Contact
- Email: hello@catscandance.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/catscandance

## Brand keywords

underground party india, electronic music bangalore, dance music india,
techno house bangalore, rave bangalore, streetwear india, cats can dance
